allow: PowerShell($files = 'tuscan-lakes.html','westover-park.html','south-shore-harbour.html','mar-bella.html','brittany-lakes.html','magnolia-creek.html','avalon.html','friendswood-lakes.html','falcon-ridge.html','west-ranch.html','heritage-park.html','wilderness-trails.html','shadow-creek-ranch.html','silverlake.html','southgate.html','country-place.html','pomona.html','meridiana.html'; foreach \($f in $files\) { $m = Select-String -Path $f -Pattern '__crumb"><' ; foreach \($x in $m\) { "$\($x.Filename\):$\($x.LineNumber\): $\($x.Line.Trim\(\)\)" } })

PowerShell($checks = @{ 'tuscan-lakes.html'=925,950; 'westover-park.html'=915,930; 'south-shore-harbour.html'=708,722; 'mar-bella.html'=583,597; 'brittany-lakes.html'=583,597; 'magnolia-creek.html'=628,642; 'falcon-ridge.html'=365,372; 'west-ranch.html'=365,372; 'country-place.html'=365,372; 'pomona.html'=365,372; 'meridiana.html'=365,372 }; foreach \($k in $checks.Keys\) { $r = $checks[$k]; Write-Output "=== $k \($\($r[0]\)-$\($r[1]\)\) ==="; $i = $r[0]; Get-Content $k | Select-Object -Skip \($r[0]-1\) -First \($r[1]-$r[0]+1\) | ForEach-Object { "$i`: $_"; $i++ } })

PowerShell(Get-ChildItem 'F:\\6. Market Updates\\June\\Article Images' -File | Select-Object Name, @{N='KB';E={[math]::Round\($_.Length/1KB\)}}, @{N='Dim';E={try{Add-Type -AssemblyName System.Drawing;$i=[System.Drawing.Image]::FromFile\($_.FullName\);"$\($i.Width\)x$\($i.Height\)";$i.Dispose\(\)}catch{'?'}}} | Format-Table -AutoSize)
